condition: viral brand, TikTok sales, K-food/K-beauty trend, ecommerce GMV, user count, or channel headline only
example: A TikTok-famous beauty device or a fast-fashion growth headline without margin and safety evidence.

condition: export growth, ASP rise, OP/EPS revision, overseas channel entry, Amazon/TikTok/Ulta sales, or OEM order growth
example: Samyang OP revision and US/Europe shipment evidence; K-beauty Ulta/Sephora/Target/Costco entry.

condition: sell-through, reorder, OPM/FCF improvement, inventory/receivables stability, repeated consumption, and price-path alignment
example: Samyang can move toward Stage 3 only if export growth converts into reorder and clean inventory.

condition: the market already accepts the K-food/K-beauty/beauty-device rerating and price moves first
example: APR share price more than quadrupled; d'Alba more than doubled after listing.

condition: recall, country sales ban, data breach, supplier pressure, payment delay, tariff, IP/product safety, hardware guidance cut, or FCF cut
example: Coupang data breach, Coupang supplier/payment fine, Whirlpool guidance/dividend cut, or Shein/Temu product-safety/IP cases.
